PRD · Acceptance Criteria PM

IDCriterionStatusEvidence
AC-1 Admin sees a list of all logbooks in a table with columns: Name, Description, Plant, Facility, Created By, Last Updated. fail —
AC-2 Typing in the search bar filters the list by logbook name in real time. fail —
AC-3 Dropdown filters for Plant and Facility are available and functional. fail —
AC-4 Clicking 'Create new logbook' opens a modal where the admin can input Name, Description, Plant, and Facility. fail —
AC-5 All fields in the logbook creation modal are mandatory, and errors are shown for empty/invalid inputs. fail —
AC-6 Pinned logbooks are visually highlighted and shown before the logbook name. fail —
AC-7 If no logbooks exist or no results match the search/filter, show a clean empty state message. fail —
AC-8 Admin is redirected to the configuration screen immediately after successful creation of a logbook. fail —
AC-9 Admin can add multiple fields from the right panel (text, checklist, dropdown, long text, attachments, table). fail —
AC-10 Admin clicks the Preview button to view the logbook layout as it would appear to users. fail —
AC-11 User can filter the list of past logbooks by date, shift, and logged by. fail —
AC-12 Logbook history page displays all entries in a structured date-wise manner. fail —
AC-13 Admin can access the 'Generate Report' popup from the logbook 3 dot menu. fail —
AC-14 If no recipients are selected, display: 'Please select at least one recipient.' fail —
AC-15 Reports are automatically sent via email to the recipients with shift or daily summaries. pass s1 s4 s8
